# awscc_resiliencehubv2_service (Resource)

Creates a resilience-managed service with associated systems, input sources, assertions, and service functions.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the service.
- `regions` (List of String) AWS regions for the service.

### Optional

- `assertions` (Attributes List) Assertions associated with this service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assertions))
- `associated_systems` (Attributes List) Systems associated with this service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--associated_systems))
- `dependency_discovery` (String) Dependency discovery state.
- `description` (String) The description of the service.
- `input_sources` (Attributes List) Input sources for this service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_sources))
- `kms_key_id` (String) The KMS key ID for encrypting service data.
- `permission_model` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_model))
- `policy_arn` (String) The ARN of the resilience policy to associate.
- `report_configuration` (Attributes) Configuration for automatic report generation on a Service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--report_configuration))
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Tags assigned to the service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the service was created.
- `effective_policy_values` (Attributes) Effective policy values computed from the associated policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--effective_policy_values))
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `service_arn` (String) The ARN of the service.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the service was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--assertions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assertions`

Optional:

- `text` (String) The text of the assertion.


<a id="nestedatt--associated_systems"></a>
### Nested Schema for `associated_systems`

Optional:

- `system_arn` (String) The system ARN.
- `user_journey_ids` (List of String) User journey IDs associated with this system.


<a id="nestedatt--input_sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_sources`

Optional:

- `resource_configuration` (Attributes) Resource configuration for an input source. Provide exactly one field. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration))

<a id="nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_sources.resource_configuration`

Optional:

- `cfn_stack_arn` (String) ARN of a CloudFormation stack.
- `design_file_s3_url` (String) S3 URL of a design file.
- `eks` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration--eks))
- `resource_tags` (Attributes List) Resource tags to discover resources. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration--resource_tags))
- `tf_state_file_url` (String) URL of a Terraform state file.

<a id="nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration--eks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_sources.resource_configuration.eks`

Optional:

- `cluster_arn` (String) ARN of the EKS cluster.
- `namespaces` (List of String) EKS namespaces.


<a id="nestedatt--input_sources--resource_configuration--resource_tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_sources.resource_configuration.resource_tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) Tag key.
- `values` (List of String) Tag values.

Optional:

- `invoker_role_name` (String) Name of the invoker IAM role.

<a id="nestedatt--permission_model--cross_account_role_arns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_model.cross_account_role_arns`

Optional:

- `external_id` (String) External ID for cross-account access.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_service.example
  identity = {
    service_arn = "service_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `service_arn` (String) The ARN of the service

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_service.example
  id = "service_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_resiliencehubv2_service.example "service_arn"
```
